entries.name: coupon-reconcile-usage-count
entries.purpose: Nightly 03:00 UTC. Recomputes coupon.usage_count from a COUNT(*) over non-reversed coupon_redemptions per active coupon. Defense against counter drift. Any drift >= 1 fires a P2 signal to observability.

entries.name: coupon-expire
entries.purpose: Nightly 04:00 UTC. Flips coupons past their valid_until timestamp to is_active=false + fires CouponExpired + releases the `coupon_slot` entitlement unit.

entries.name: coupon-notify-expiring
entries.purpose: Daily 09:00 UTC. Sends CouponExpiredNotification warnings at 14 / 7 / 1 day before valid_until, for coupons with usage_count > 0.

entries.name: coupon-generate-usage-report
entries.purpose: Weekly Monday 06:00 UTC. Generates per-tenant coupon usage report (7-day rolling window) + writes CSV/JSON to signed S3 + fires CouponReportGenerated + dispatches WeeklyCouponReportNotification to opt-in recipients.

entries.name: coupon-purge-expired
entries.purpose: Weekly Sunday 05:00 UTC. Hard-purge coupons + non-invoice-linked redemptions past 7-year (or 10-year Enterprise) retention. Invoice-linked redemptions migrate to compliance_archive.coupon_redemptions first.
